title: Add trusted SpecSync self-host artifact inputs
description: Add trusted SpecSync self-host artifact inputs
acceptance_criteria: Trust exposes SpecSync version and download-base inputs with released 5.0.1 defaults; only an empty mirror or a canonical local file URL confined beneath RUNNER_TEMP is accepted; invalid authority
and non-local schemes fail before lifecycle execution; the nested immutable SpecSync action receives validated values; manifest and runtime regressions pass
